positive: detailed scene of a majestic mountain range at sunrise with a lone figure in the foreground, set against a vibrant blue sky with fluffy white clouds and a subtle gradient of warm golden light
negative: artifact and quality blockers: blur, artifacts, text, watermarks, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, low detail, and any print-friendly restrictions as comma-separated tags: motion blur, anti-aliasing issues, low resolution, insufficient color depth
